headerTitle: Agentic AI Platform Evangelist  ·  Sabre Corporation  ·  Travel Technology  ·  Southlake, TX
subjectText: Evangelist, Agentic AI Platform — Sabre Corporation (Southlake, TX) · $95K–$147K
intro: Sabre powers the global travel industry — airlines, hotels, agencies — and is now building agentic AI on top of that infrastructure. The Evangelist role is the person who makes developers and enterprise partners actually understand and adopt the platform. I build agentic AI systems in production daily, I can demo them live, and I speak to the technical audience without losing the business case.
bullets: Agentic AI in production — 14 live endpoints using Claude Code CLI daily: MCP protocol, multi-step agent pipelines, tool use, structured JSON output (Zod), human-in-the-loop confirm-before-execute gates, and multi-model routing across Claude/GPT-4o/Gemini. Not a practitioner who learned from docs — a builder who uses these systems every day and can show the seams.

Developer audience communication — six FDE engagements built on the same loop: understand what developers and operators actually need, translate platform capability into language that maps to their workflow, drive adoption past the first demo. That’s the evangelist motion applied to real business problems.

Travel & hospitality domain — 12 years GM-level hospitality operations: high-volume F&B, hotel adjacents, guest experience, vendor systems. Sabre’s customers are airlines, hotels, and agencies — operators I have native context on. The AI platform story lands differently when the evangelist has run the operation.
closingLine: Available immediately. DFW-based (Little Elm, TX) — Southlake is commutable. Can start any day.
matchNotes: Strong match: agentic AI builder + hospitality domain + DFW-based commute. Salary $95-147K is below Will's floor but the role type (DevRel/Evangelist) is a strong on-ramp and Sabre is a major company with career leverage. DFW location is the unique advantage.
